zh.lifeSummary: 當Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln於0995年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特時，他的父親Lambert I van Gent-4歲，母親Ermengarde de Flandre-9歲。他於1047年與Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg在比利時利包格阿爾斯特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他去世於1056年享年61歲，埋葬在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln于0995年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特时，他的父亲Lambert I van Gent-4岁，母亲Ermengarde de Flandre-9岁。他于1047年与Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg在比利时利包格阿爾斯特结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。他去世于1056年享年61岁，埋葬在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Basque: topographic name derived from (a variant of) gain ‘peak, summit’ + the definite article -a.
Hispanic (Philippines): nickname from Spanish gana ‘appetite; enthusiasm’, a word borrowed into various languages of the Philippines.

variants.name: Ganapathy
meanings: Indian: from a personal name from Hindi and Sanskrit ganapati, one of the names of the elephant god Ganesh, meaning ‘lord of the masses’.

nameMeanings.name: Raoul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: "Radulf"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name, Reginulfr, derived from regin ‘advice, decision’ + úlfr ‘wolf’. This was introduced into Scotland and northern England by Scandinavian settlers in the early Middle Ages and modern use is largely confined to these areas.

en.lifeSummary: When Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln was born in 0995, in Gent, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Lambert I van Gent, was -4 and his mother, Ermengarde de Flandre, was -9. He married Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg in 1047, in Aalst, Limburg, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He died in 1056, at the age of 61, and was buried in Gent, East Flanders, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln est né en 0995, à Gent, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Lambert I van Gent, avait -4 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde de Flandre, avait -9 ans. Il a épousé Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg en 1047, à Aalst, Limbourg, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il est décédé en 1056, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Gent, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln 0995 in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lambert I van Gent -4 und seine Mutter Ermengarde de Flandre -9. Er hat 1047 in Aalst, Limburg, Belgien Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb 1056 im Alter von 61 Jahren und wurde in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln è nato il nel 0995 nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Lambert I van Gent, aveva -4 anni e il suo madre, Ermengarde de Flandre, aveva -9 anni. Lui sposato Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg nel 1047, nel Aalst, Limburgo, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì nel 1056, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincolnが0995年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで生まれた時，父Lambert I van Gentは-4歳，母Ermengarde de Flandreは-9歳であった。1047年にベルギーリンブルグアールストでGisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼は1056年に61歳で死去し，ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln(이)가 0995년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lambert I van Gent(은)는 -4세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde de Flandre(은)는 -9세였다. 그는 1047년 벨기에 림버그 알스트에서 Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1056년 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln nasceu em 0995, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Lambert I van Gent, tinha -4 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde de Flandre, tinha -9 anos. Ele casou-se com Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg em 1047, em Aalst, Limburgo, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1056, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln родился в 0995 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Lambert I van Gent было -4 год, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde de Flandre, -9. Он женился на женщине по имени Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg в 1047 г. в местности аалст, лимбург, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он умер в 1056 г. в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raoul "Radulf" De Gand 1st Earl Of Lincoln nació en 0995, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Lambert I van Gent, tenía -4 años y su mamá, Ermengarde de Flandre, tenía -9 años. Se casó con Gisele De Luxembourg Of Luxembourg en 1047, en Aalst, Limburgo, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió en 1056, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica.
